---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
listing:
  id: viz-listing
  contents: portfolio
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 4
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, categories, title, description]
  image-height: 150px
  filter-ui: false
  categories: false
---

::: {.listing-header}
::: {}
[05 — Portfolio]{.label}

::: {.h1}
Making invisible systems visible through data
:::
:::
::: {.filter-bar data-filter-group="true" data-filter-target="#listing-viz-listing"}
<button type="button" class="filter-btn is-active" data-filter="All">All</button>
<button type="button" class="filter-btn" data-filter="Visualisation">Visualisation</button>
<button type="button" class="filter-btn" data-filter="Dataset">Dataset</button>
<button type="button" class="filter-btn" data-filter="Code">Code</button>
:::
:::

::: {#viz-listing}
:::
